'''Furellas''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] with light brown fur and shaved shoulders. She was an associate of the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Kikow]] and a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Kalmec]], a Wookiee criminal organization with rumored ties to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. Furellas helped [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] a [[Ralltiir tiger]] kitten out of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] for [[Vareesa Enan]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].
